messages.entry_path.required: Please select whether you are applying for Intermediate or Undergraduate admission.
messages.program_id.required: Please select the programme you want to apply for.
messages.program_id.exists: The selected programme is not available for this admission category.
messages.city.required: Please enter your city or district.
messages.name.required: Please enter the student full name.
messages.father_name.required: Please enter father or guardian name.
messages.cnic.required: Please enter student CNIC or B-Form.
messages.cnic.regex: CNIC / B-Form format should be xxxxx-xxxxxxx-x.
messages.phone.regex: Guardian mobile should be in Pakistani format, e.g. +92 312-3456789.
messages.student_phone.regex: Student mobile should be in Pakistani format, e.g. +92 312-3456789.
messages.email.email: Please enter a valid email address.
messages.declare_true.accepted: You must accept the declaration before submitting the application.
messages.academic.matric.marks.required: Please enter matric marks in obtained/total format.
messages.academic.matric.marks.regex: Matric marks must be in format like 850/1100.
messages.academic.hssc.marks.required: Please enter HSSC marks in obtained/total format.
messages.academic.hssc.marks.regex: HSSC marks must be in format like 850/1100.
messages.academic.matric_summary.board.required: Please enter matric board summary for undergraduate applicants.
messages.academic.matric_summary.pass_year.requir: Please enter matric passing year summary for undergraduate applicants.
messages.academic.matric_summary.marks.regex: Matric summary marks must be in format like 900/1100.
messages.academic.hssc.qualification.required: Please select intermediate / HSSC qualification for undergraduate admission.
messages.academic.hssc.pass_year.min: HSSC passing year must be 2018 or later.
messages.academic.hssc.pass_year.max: HSSC passing year cannot be later than 2035.
messages.academic.matric.pass_year.min: Matric passing year must be 2018 or later.
messages.academic.matric.pass_year.max: Matric passing year cannot be later than 2035.
messages.academic.matric_summary.pass_year.min: Matric passing year summary must be 2018 or later.
messages.academic.matric_summary.pass_year.max: Matric passing year summary cannot be later than 2035.
